subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who created the water from His manifest utterance in the Kingdom of Eternity. Then He gazed upon it and, lo, it trembled within itself and a part of it became congealed
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی خلق الماء من بیانه الظاهر فی ملکوت البقاء ثم نظر الیه انه ارتعد ی نفسه و انجمد
subcodes.subjects: @celestial spheres [aflak]; planets; astronomy, @creation of the world, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria)
